response:
To compute the **sample variance** of the data set:

$$
\{1, 12, -17, -3, -11, -5\}
$$

---

### Step 1: Find the mean (average) of the data set

$$
\bar{x} = \frac{1 + 12 + (-17) + (-3) + (-11) + (-5)}{6}
$$

$$
\bar{x} = \frac{1 + 12 - 17 - 3 - 11 - 5}{6} = \frac{-23}{6}
$$

---

### Step 2: Compute the squared deviations from the mean

$$
\begin{align*}
(1 - (-\frac{23}{6}))^2 &= \left(\frac{29}{6}\right)^2 = \frac{841}{36} \\
(12 - (-\frac{23}{6}))^2 &= \left(\frac{107}{6}\right)^2 = \frac{11449}{36} \\
(-17 - (-\frac{23}{6}))^2 &= \left(-\frac{95}{6}\right)^2 = \frac{9025}{36} \\
(-3 - (-\frac{23}{6}))^2 &= \left(\frac{11}{6}\right)^2 = \frac{121}{36} \\
(-11 - (-\frac{23}{6}))^2 &= \left(-\frac{53}{6}\right)^2 = \frac{2809}{36} \\
(-5 - (-\frac{23}{6}))^2 &= \left(\frac{13}{6}\right)^2 = \frac{169}{36} \\
\end{align*}
$$

---

### Step 3: Sum the squared deviations

$$
\text{Sum of squares} = \frac{841 + 11449 + 9025 + 121 + 2809 + 169}{36}
$$

$$
\text{Sum of squares} = \frac{23604}{36}
$$

---

### Step 4: Divide by $
